## Summary of all changes in this session

Three commits were made to `main` during this session. This PR captures the remaining housekeeping (package-lock + PR template).

---

### Already merged to main

#### `a140610` — feat: integrate SportsGameOdds with daily snapshot/cache layer
- `sportsbook-api.js` — SportsGameOdds added as priority #1 odds provider
  - Auth via `x-api-key` header (`VITE_SPORTSGAMEODDS_API_KEY` env var, never hardcoded)
  - Odds fetched per-game (event-level), never player-by-player
  - localStorage snapshot layer keyed by `sgo_snapshot:<YYYY-MM-DD>`
  - Reused for entire day — zero extra API calls per run
  - Exports `getSnapshotMeta()` and `refreshSnapshot()` for the UI
- `analysis-runner.js` — `runAnalysis()` accepts `opts = { refreshOdds }` flag
- `Today.jsx` — Sportsbook Odds Snapshot card with:
  - Snapshot Date / First Fetched / Last Updated / Sportsbooks Included
  - Toggle: Refresh odds on next run (default OFF)
  - Button: Refresh Today's Sportsbook Odds

#### `0fd9478` — fix: parlay generation blocked when no live odds API key configured
- `parlays.js` — `hasFallbackOdds()` was applied to both `strictPool` and `broaderPool`
- When no API key is set all predictions use fallback odds → both pools empty → no parlays ever generated
- Fix: three-tier pool with graceful degradation:
  - `strictPool` — live odds + recommended (best quality)
  - `broaderPool` — recommended picks regardless of odds source
  - `anyPool` — last resort, any non-missing pick

---

### This PR
- Commits `package-lock.json` generated by `npm install`
- Adds `.github/pr-body.md` PR description template
